videos.title: If I Started Over With $0, Here’s My Exact Plan to get to $1M
videos.description:
✅ Get your FREE Sell by Chat Playbook here: https://go.danmartell.com/4c6Lxw7

If I lost everything tomorrow and had to rebuild from scratch, this is the exact playbook I would follow. I built multiple companies from nothing, and I know firsthand what actually works when you have no money, no connections, and no safety net.

I break down the step by step plan I would use to go from zero to my first paying clients as fast as possible, including how AI changes the game at every stage. Watch to the
